header.sub_page_1: La Cucina Toscana  ·  Austin, Texas  ·  Since 2000

about_blurb: The cuisine of the Tuscan region can best be described as refined simplicity. At Siena, we utilize ingredients of the highest quality — techniques and classical skills that have weathered the test of time, enhancing the natural flavors already present.

bread_note.title: Fresh Baked Bread
bread_note.body: Each day at Siena we bake all of our bread from scratch. Fifteen minutes before guests arrive, we bake just enough to ensure each table gets the hottest, freshest bread possible. Bread is complimentary and served upon request — to prevent waste and to respect our gluten-free guests.

raw_warning_full: * Consuming raw or undercooked beef, poultry, or seafood may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.
raw_warning_short: * Consuming raw or undercooked beef, poultry, or seafood may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
policy_line: No split checks.  ·  Gratuity of 22% for parties of 6 or more.
